label: agent loop • repeated identical exec call arms the stuck-loop nudge
query: Run the shell command `echo ping` exactly three times. Issue one shell_run call per step, with identical arguments every time — do not vary the command. After the third run, tell me how many times you ran it, spelling the count out as a word (write "three", not the digit 3).
notes: Pins that the harness's strongest stuck signal actually fires: shell_run is exec-like so identical calls re-execute by design (no dedupe), and the third identical call must arm the repeated-call nudge, which the driver stages as a notice on the following step. Asserts the notice text landed — independent of whether the model obeyed it.
